title: 【转载】致敬周小平夫妇，俄国演员Polina Menshikh参加俄军炮兵日慰问演出中阵亡

contents:
Российская актриса Полина Меньших погибла при обстреле в Донбассе - РИА

Российская актриса и театральный режиссер Полина Меньших погибла во время выступления в Донбассе


注：该演员死讯已得到俄罗斯官媒RIA证实

新闻链接：https://www.thesun.co.uk/news/24814398/ukraine-revenge-missile-strike-concert-putin-marines/

The dramatic footage highlights a concert marking Russia’s annual Day of Missile Forces and Artillery.

It shows Russian actress and choreographer Polina Menshikh, 40, playing the guitar and singing for the marines as the deadly two-missile strike hits, and the video blacks out.

She was reported to have been killed in the attack in the village of Kumachovo, some 37 miles from the frontline.

Russia immediately ordered a news blackout on the troop losses from the US-made HIMARS strike, say reports.

The strike was on Sunday, but footage has only now emerged.

The Russian Investigative Committee announced a criminal probe into the attack with “killed a civilian” - yet it is clear from Russian sources that Ukrainian claims of a  large toll from the pinpoint strike are correct.

The Ukrainian military described the strike as a "reckoning blow".

Commander of Ukrainian aerial reconnaissance unit Birds of Magyar, Robert Brovdi said the Kyiv’s forces had attacked the 810th separate brigade of the Russian Marines in “revenge for the 128th Brigade”.

This refers to a November 4 strike by Russia on an awards ceremony near the frontline on Ukraine’s Artillery Forces Day in which at least 20 soldiers from the 128th were killed and many wounded  by a Kh-59 hit.

Ukrainian president Volodymyr Zelensky branded it “a tragedy that could have been avoided”, and a criminal investigation was launched.

At least 25 Russian marines were killed and more than 100 were wounded in the Sunday strike, he claimed. 

The losses of the command personnel were classified by a Russian military commission that arrived at the scene, he said.

Obituaries would soon appear in Sevastopol, he said.

The 810th are based in the city, the main naval port in occupied Crimea.

The latest strike enraged Russian war bloggers.

Putin-loyal Telegram Channel Military Informant hit out at the “untaught idiots” amount Russia’s commanders who did not expect the Ukraine’s to seek revenge as its troops marked their Artillery Forces Day.

“The building where the show event was held was located only 37 miles from the frontline.

“The result is predictable - the enemy struck with HIMARS, including Russian actress Polina Menshikh, who was performing at that moment, who died.

“Almost two years of war, and the untaught idiots still do not know what to do and what not to do.”

The channel denounced the decision to organise a concert for military personnel so close to the frontline.

11.19，伟大的俄罗斯国防军810旅在距前线37公里的Kumachovo庆祝他们的炮兵日，不仅邀请了来自圣彼得堡的著名艺术家Polina Menshikh登场演出，乌克兰国防军也同样献上了一份大礼，送这位艺术家和至少25名俄军提前与列宁同志会面了。

乌方称此次袭击是为此前遭受袭击的128旅复仇，俄军事频道Military Informant则对俄810旅遭到袭击表现得愤怒，他指责其指挥官是教不会的白痴，没有考虑到乌军的报复行动而轻率地在前线附近举行演出。

虽然俄810旅遭受袭击，但是辩证地看，也清除了不合格的士兵，使得军队质量得到提升，在同仇敌忾的氛围下，相信特别军事行动必将按计划进行，为普京总统明年的连任献上大礼。
